message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[100, 50]","[40, 60]","[[0, 1, 0]]"],"focus":"Zero synergy limit between two populated regions — forces cross-region allocation (tests zero-limit handling and infeasibility conditions)."},{"input_lines":["[0, 200, 200]","[100, 100, 200]","[[0, 1, 2], [1, 2, 3]]"],"focus":"Zero-player region appearing in synergies and mixed connectivity — tests zero-player handling and local vs connected balancing."},{"input_lines":["[1000, 999, 1000, 999, 1000]","[200, 250, 200, 250, 200]","[[0, 1, 7], [1, 2, 7], [2, 3, 7], [3, 4, 7], [4, 0, 7]]"],"focus":"Cyclic chain with tight limits causing cascading rebalances — stresses iterative resolution, sorting by excess, and termination."}]}
